---

# Resource: signalfx_automated_archival_settings

Manages the organization-wide automated archival policy for unused metrics.

## Example

```terraform
resource "signalfx_automated_archival_settings" "example" {
  enabled         = true
  lookback_period = "P30D"
  grace_period    = "P15D"
  ruleset_limit   = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether automated metric archival is enabled for the organization.
- `grace_period` (String) Protection period for newly created metrics in ISO 8601 duration format, such as P0D, P15D, P30D, P45D, or P60D.
- `lookback_period` (String) Unused-metric lookback period in ISO 8601 duration format, such as P30D, P45D, or P60D.

### Optional

- `ruleset_limit` (Number) Organization limit for the number of metric rulesets that can be created.

### Read-Only

- `created` (Number) Creation timestamp returned by Splunk Observability Cloud.
- `creator` (String) ID of the user who created the automated archival settings.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the resource.
- `last_updated` (Number) Most recent update timestamp returned by Splunk Observability Cloud.
- `last_updated_by` (String) ID of the user who most recently updated the automated archival settings.
- `version` (String) Optimistic-concurrency version of the automated archival settings.
